UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1066 MARKET LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, CURTIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 50 JONES STREET #1107, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94102, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY***
